177 E4AB E4AB_WANDERS_ALT (E4AB) Wandering Alterability CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns: behavioral symptoms - wandering -behavior symptom alterability. 0 = Behavior not present OR behavior easily altered, 1 = Behavior was not easily altered, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
